3290110.name: Lanesplitterz
3290110.description:
Lanesplitterz is a 3D arcade-style bowling game where you compete to rule over Neo Las Vegas, the last remaining city in the aftermath of a nuclear winter.

In this extreme evolution of bowling, thrill-seeking daredevils shoot themselves from cannons down the Vegas strip toward bowling pins the size of buildings. Face off against the city's top Lanesplitterz in a battle against corruption to win the tournament and become the King!

BOWL:

Be the ball as you bowl against 3 unique anime-style bosses.

CHALLENGE:

Experience each boss' dramatic story, each with custom over-the top character art, special abilities, and custom music.

DOMINATE:

Save Neo Las Vegas from the tyrannical rule of King Julius Caesar!
